code: export const formatCurrency=value=>{const numericValue=typeof value==='string'?parseFloat(value):value;if(!isFinite(numericValue)){return'0.00';}return numericValue.toLocaleString('en-US',{minimumFractionDigits:2,maximumFractionDigits:2});};export const formatDate=value=>{if(!value){return'';}const date=typeof value==='string'?new Date(value):value;if(Number.isNaN(date.getTime())){return'';}return date.toLocaleDateString();};
